title: Clean async context manager refactor
author: contributor
pr_description: Refactors DB transaction handling to use async context manager.
diff:
--- a/db.py
+++ b/db.py
@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+from contextlib import asynccontextmanager
+
+@asynccontextmanager
+async def transaction(conn):
+    async with conn.begin():
+        try:
+            yield conn
+            await conn.commit()
+        except Exception:
+            await conn.rollback()
+            raise
